form.formComment: Last start finished last over 457m at Temora beaten 14 lengths (26.77) behind Havoc One in a Mix on March 15. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

form.formComment: At the last start finished last in a Maiden on March 27 over 400m at this track behind Ivory Nara beaten 11 lengths (24.62). Forgive the latest run. Has solid claims on her best form.
